extracted.name: 钱堃

personal_info.brief_description: 2004年毕业于东南大学自动控制系，获工学学士学位，2010年博士研究生毕业于东南大学自动化学院（硕博连读），获工学博士学位，并留校任教。

affiliations.group: 模式识别与智能系统学科组

research_interests: 机器人感知与智能机器人系统技术
机器人抓取与操作技能学习

research_interest_examples.title: Learning-based Robot Grasping
research_interest_examples.description: Explores how a robot learns 6D grasp pose from RGB-D cameras, Sim2Real transfer learning, and object pose estimation.

research_interest_examples.title: Learning-by-demonstration
research_interest_examples.description: Focuses on imitation learning via video demonstration. Grasping skills of a dexterous hand can be learned from human tele-operation.

research_interest_examples.title: Tactile perception
research_interest_examples.description: Proposes a novel tactile-motor policy learning method to generalize tactile-guided robot manipulation skills from simulation to reality using unsupervised adversarial domain adaptation of tactile images. Also used to manipulate deformable objects via Sim2Real skill learning or tactile servoing.

research_interest_examples.title: Environmental perception and SLAM
research_interest_examples.description: Includes work on Bag-of-Point-and-Line-Word Pairs for visual SLAM, Lidar SLAM, 3D Gaussian mapping, and vision and lidar multi-modal perception of power transmission lines.

images.description: Lidar SLAM of our Sipailou campus.
3D Gaussian mapping of our Sipailou campus.
Vison and lidar multi-modal perception of power transmission lines.
